adaptive_card.default.title: Welcome
adaptive_card.qa.title: Adaptive Card settings
qa.default.description: Configure how this step loads and localizes an Adaptive Card.
qa.default.title: Default Adaptive Card setup
qa.question.catalog_registry_ref.help: Enter a distributable card catalog reference such as store://greentic-biz/_/adaptive-cards/default or repo://my-repo/cards/catalog.json.
qa.question.catalog_registry_ref.label: Card catalog reference
qa.question.card_source.help: Choose whether to load the card from a JSON file in the pack or paste raw inline card JSON.
qa.question.card_source.label: How should cards be loaded by default?
qa.question.confirm_remove.help: Choose Yes to clear this component configuration.
qa.question.confirm_remove.label: Remove this Adaptive Card configuration?
qa.question.default_card_asset.help: Enter the default card asset path or reference. Example: assets/cards/welcome.json or repo://my-repo/cards/welcome.json
qa.question.default_card_asset.label: Default card asset path/reference
qa.question.default_card_inline.help: Paste the default Adaptive Card JSON that should be used when no invocation override is provided.
qa.question.default_card_inline.label: Paste the default Adaptive Card JSON
qa.question.direction_mode.help: Choose how the card root should set its text direction.
qa.question.direction_mode.label: Text direction
qa.question.language_mode.help: Choose whether to support every built-in locale or a custom locale list.
qa.question.language_mode.label: Which languages do you want to support?
qa.question.multilingual.help: English remains the implicit baseline fallback even when you enable multiple languages.
qa.question.multilingual.label: Do you want to support multiple languages?
qa.question.supported_locales.help: Enter a comma-separated list of locale codes. Example: en,fr,de
qa.question.supported_locales.label: Enter the locale codes
qa.question.trace_capture_inputs.help: When enabled, traces may include payload, session, state, and interaction inputs.
qa.question.trace_capture_inputs.label: Include inputs in traces
qa.question.trace_enabled.help: Emit adaptive-card trace telemetry for asset resolution, bindings, and state activity.
qa.question.trace_enabled.label: Enable tracing
qa.question.update_area.help: Choose which part of the component configuration to update.
qa.question.update_area.label: What would you like to update?
qa.question.validation_mode.help: Choose how strictly invocation schema problems should be handled.
qa.question.validation_mode.label: Validation mode
qa.remove.description: Remove or reset this component configuration.
qa.remove.title: Remove Adaptive Card setup
qa.setup.description: Configure card defaults, multilingual behavior, direction, validation, and tracing.
qa.setup.title: Setup Adaptive Card
qa.update.description: Update one area of Adaptive Card configuration at a time.
qa.update.title: Update Adaptive Card
validation.card.duplicate-action-id: Action ids should be unique within the card
validation.card.duplicate-id: Input ids should be unique within the card
validation.card.empty-choices: Input.ChoiceSet must include at least one choice
validation.card.empty-columns: ColumnSet columns must not be empty
validation.card.empty-target-elements: Action.ToggleVisibility targetElements must not be empty
validation.card.invalid-card: Action.ShowCard card must be an object
validation.card.invalid-choice: Choices must include non-empty title and value
validation.card.invalid-choices: Input.ChoiceSet choices must be an array
validation.card.invalid-columns: ColumnSet columns must be an array
validation.card.invalid-data: Action.Execute data should be an object when present
validation.card.invalid-root: Card must be a JSON object
validation.card.invalid-source: Media sources must include non-empty url
validation.card.invalid-sources: Media sources must be an array
validation.invocation.invalid_enum: Invocation field has an unsupported enum value
validation.invocation.invalid_type: Invocation field has an invalid type
validation.invocation.missing_field: Invocation is missing a required field
